title: Agentic Workspace Module Capability Contract
description: Schema for Agentic Workspace Module Capability Contract.

description.description: Human-readable description of the module's purpose.

selection_rank.description: Rank used to order modules during selection and execution.

include_in_full_preset.description: Whether this module is included in the 'full' preset by default.

items.description: Item string accepted by capabilities in Agentic Workspace Module Capability Contract.

capabilities.description: Durable product capabilities the module owns.

items.description: Item string accepted by commands in Agentic Workspace Module Capability Contract.

commands.description: Lifecycle hooks the workspace layer may orchestrate.

items.description: Item enumerated value accepted by +$ in Agentic Workspace Module Capability Contract.

^.+$.description: Pattern-matched array entry for command args.<^ in Agentic Workspace Module Capability Contract.

command_args.description: Arguments accepted by each lifecycle command.

items.description: Item string accepted by install signals in Agentic Workspace Module Capability Contract.

install_signals.description: Repo surfaces that indicate the module is materially installed.

items.description: Item string accepted by workflow surfaces in Agentic Workspace Module Capability Contract.

workflow_surfaces.description: Repo surfaces that belong to the module's working contract.

items.description: Item string accepted by generated artifacts in Agentic Workspace Module Capability Contract.

generated_artifacts.description: Generated outputs whose drift should be reported instead of hand-edited.

items.description: Item string accepted by dependencies in Agentic Workspace Module Capability Contract.

dependencies.description: Other modules that must also be selected when this module is selected.

items.description: Item string accepted by conflicts in Agentic Workspace Module Capability Contract.

conflicts.description: Other modules that may not be selected at the same time.

items.description: Item string accepted by startup steps in Agentic Workspace Module Capability Contract.

startup_steps.description: Ordered steps recommended for fresh agents during startup.

items.description: Item string accepted by sources of truth in Agentic Workspace Module Capability Contract.

sources_of_truth.description: Canonical sources of truth for the module's domain.

schema_version.description: The schema version string field in Agentic Workspace Module Capability Contract.

items.description: Item string accepted by guaranteed fields in Agentic Workspace Module Capability Contract.

guaranteed_fields.description: The guaranteed fields array field in Agentic Workspace Module Capability Contract.

items.description: Item string accepted by action fields in Agentic Workspace Module Capability Contract.

action_fields.description: The action fields array field in Agentic Workspace Module Capability Contract.

items.description: Item string accepted by warning fields in Agentic Workspace Module Capability Contract.

warning_fields.description: The warning fields array field in Agentic Workspace Module Capability Contract.

result_contract.description: The schema version and required fields the workspace adapter guarantees to preserve.
